title: Integrated Circuit
description:
Your first Integrated Circuit needs the PCB, one integrated chip, and a pure quartz glass pane. Throw all 3 items into the inscriber to create your first Integrated Circuit.

Make the Integrated Circuit.
description_completed: Congrats! You can finally tear down that Create Monstrosity you made so long ago. The Integrated Circuits are a complete replacement for the Rudimentary Processor.
